reason: Response A is an implausible, out-of-character refusal that misidentifies the model as "Claude Code" and declines a benign creative-writing task—real Claude/Haiku models readily write congratulatory messages and would not call this "outside my intended purpose." Response B directly and warmly fulfills the prompt with fluent, on-task prose, which is exactly what genuine Haiku would produce. The refusal in A reads like an imitation that over-applies a fabricated identity constraint.
